steps.title: Separate example from claim
steps.content: The first clause says many writers are still well known. The next independent clause gives Malika Ouattara as an example of that claim. The blank needs punctuation that can introduce an illustrative independent clause.

steps.title: Eliminate faulty punctuation
steps.content: A creates a run-on. B creates a comma splice. D creates an ungrammatical join with "and" before the example. A colon correctly signals that the following clause illustrates the claim. The answer is C.
